subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Thou in Whose hand are the reins of all things and in Whose grasp is the kingdom of all names! I beseech Thee by Thy most exalted Word
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من بیدک زمام الاشیاء و فی قبضتک ملکوت الاسماء اسئلک بالکلمه العلیا
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @wisdom [hikmat]
